The freelance money problem

You're not bad with money.
The system just wasn't built for you.

Traditional budgeting apps assume a steady paycheck. Yours isn't. That's not a flaw — it's a different mode of working that demands a different financial tool.

📊

Unpredictable Monthly Income

$3k one month, $9k the next. Traditional apps shrug. FreelanceFlow uses your trailing income history to set a spending number that stays sane across feast-or-famine cycles.

±$4,200
average monthly income swing
🧾

Tax Season Anxiety

Quarterly taxes, self-employment tax, progressive brackets — you're not an accountant. FreelanceFlow calculates your exact obligations, reserves the right amount, and reminds you before deadlines.

$4,800
average surprise tax bill avoided
💸

Overspending in Good Months

Earning $9k feels great — until February. A safe-to-spend number prevents the feast mentality from creating famine problems. Spend confidently, not recklessly.

63%
of users report less financial anxiety
How FreelanceFlow works

Four tools. One financial foundation.

01 — Safe-to-spend engine

Your personal spending number, recalculated monthly

No more guessing whether you can afford something. FreelanceFlow runs a volatility-adjusted calculation across your income history to give you a single, reliable monthly budget.

  • Based on your actual income patterns — not averages
  • Accounts automatically for slow months and tax reserves
  • Confidence score: high / medium / low based on data depth
  • Adjusts in real-time when new income arrives
Try the Calculator
Income history window12 months
Average monthly income$5,200
Avg. monthly gross$5,200
Tax reserve (25%)−$1,300
Volatility buffer−$468
Safe monthly spend$3,432
● HIGH confidence — 12+ months
02 — Automated tax planning

Know your tax bill before the IRS does

Multi-country tax engines with progressive bracket support. FreelanceFlow sets aside the exact right amount from every payment and reminds you before every quarterly deadline.

  • US, UK, and Australia (more coming)
  • Progressive brackets, self-employment tax, state estimates
  • Quarterly due-date calendar with push alerts
  • Reconcile estimates vs. actual after filing
Tax Estimator
Federal income tax$4,200
Self-employment tax$7,065
State tax (est.)$1,200
Annual total$12,465
Quarterly: $3,116 due Apr 15 · Jun 15 · Sep 15 · Jan 15
Federal
SE Tax
State
03 — Bank sync & reconciliation

Invoice sent. Payment received. Matched automatically.

Connect your bank via Plaid and watch invoices reconcile themselves. Every payment triggers a tax reserve, updates your safe-to-spend, and closes the loop on your cash flow.

  • Powered by Plaid — read-only bank access
  • AI matching with 99.2% accuracy
  • Instant tax reserve on every deposit
  • Invoice-to-cash timeline visible at a glance
Invoice → Payment Flow
📧
Invoice Created
Invoice#2024-047
ClientAcme Studio
Amount$5,000
PENDING
🏦
Bank Deposit Detected
Amount+$5,000
FromAcme Studio LLC
Match100% confident
MATCHED ✓
✅
Payment Recorded
Tax reserved$1,250 (25%)
Net available$3,750
Safe-to-spend ↑$2,420
PAID ✓
04 — AI financial coach

Your personal CFO, available 24/7

Ask any money question and get answers grounded in your actual numbers — not generic advice. The Coach knows your income history, tax reserves, and upcoming obligations.

  • Contextual answers from your real financial data
  • Scenario modeling: "can I afford X?"
  • Proactive alerts before cash crunches
  • Powered by Claude — thoughtful, not gimmicky
🤖
FreelanceFlow Coach
● Online — knows your numbers
Can I afford a $2,000 laptop if my main project ends next month?
Based on your data:
· Safe monthly spend: $2,269
· Cash position: $8,500 (3.7 months runway)
· Forecast (next month): $3,200 — lower season

✓ You can afford it. It's ~88% of one month's budget. However — given the forecast dip, consider waiting 2–3 weeks or using 0% financing to preserve emergency buffer.

Confidence: HIGH (14 months of data)
From the community

Freelancers who stopped worrying
and started planning.

★★★★★

FreelanceFlow removed the financial anxiety I didn't even know I was carrying. I finally know how much I can safely spend every month without stressing about taxes or a slow client month.

Sarah M.
Brand & UX Designer
$45k/yr · 2 years with FreelanceFlow
★★★★★

Tax time used to give me genuine nightmares. I'd owe money I hadn't set aside. Now I just check the app — the reserve is always there. It's changed how I run my business.

Jordan T.
Independent Strategy Consultant
$120k/yr · 3 years with FreelanceFlow
★★★★★

The AI Coach answered a question in 10 seconds that my accountant would have charged $200 to answer — and it cited my actual numbers. Nothing else comes close for freelancers.

Maya K.
Senior Fullstack Developer
$95k/yr · 18 months with FreelanceFlow
Pricing

Simple pricing.
No surprises.

The irony of a financial app with hidden fees wouldn't be lost on us. One plan for most freelancers.

forever

per month

Frequently asked
Income & expense tracking, basic tax estimates, 3 months of history, and unlimited invoices. No bank connection or AI Coach on the free tier — but enough to see if FreelanceFlow clicks for you.
Yes. Upgrade instantly — your data carries over. Downgrade with 7 days notice. No lock-in contracts, no cancellation fees. We'd rather earn your subscription every month.
Bank connections are read-only via Plaid. We never see your credentials and cannot initiate transactions. All data is encrypted with AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. We're SOC 2 Type II certified.
Currently US (federal + state), UK (PAYE/self-assessment), and Australia (GST + income tax). Canada and New Zealand are on the roadmap for Q3 2025. Request your country in-app.
Trust & security

Your financial data deserves
bank-level care.

🔐
Bank-Level Encryption

Every byte of your data is encrypted with AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Keys rotate every 90 days. Backups encrypted on Amazon S3.

  • AES-256 encryption at rest
  • TLS 1.3 for all communications
  • Encrypted backups on AWS S3
  • 90-day automatic key rotation
🛡️
SOC 2 Type II Certified

Independently audited annually. Our security controls, availability, and confidentiality commitments are verified by a third-party firm — not just promised.

  • Annual third-party security audits
  • Formal incident response plan
  • Regular penetration testing
  • Zero data breaches since launch
🌍
GDPR & Privacy Ready

Full GDPR compliance with data portability, right to erasure, and consent transparency. Your data is yours — export or delete it at any time in one click.

  • One-click data export
  • Right to deletion honored instantly
  • Consent tracking & audit log
  • No data sold to third parties. Ever.
PLAID
Bank connectivity
STRIPE
Payment processing
AWS
Infrastructure
ANTHROPIC
AI coaching

Ready to know exactly
where you stand?
